Patch Set 4: Code-Review-1

replay-single test53a failure is expected with this patch, because it expects a CLOSE request to be in parallel with others but MDC has only 1 RPC in-flight limit with previous patches. I think this test should be moved to the ALWAYS_EXCEPT list until all patches will be landed.

Patch Set 6:

conf-sanity test_53b failed because several mdt threads are started in parallel: cf. "ptlrpc_start_thread()) Creating thread mdt #4 race, retry later" in MDS1 debug log.

It might be useful to give more time for threads to start, since start will be attempted again by ptlrpc_main() at next loop.

Anyway, this failure is not related to the patch.
Could someone retrigger the tests (or can I do it myself) ?
Patch Set 6: Code-Review+1

Patch Set 6:

Hi Grégoire,

> Anyway, this failure is not related to the patch. Could someone retrigger the tests (or can I do it myself) ?

LU-6563 was resolved by reverting the patch that introduced the regression from master branch. Could you please rebase the patch?

Patch Set 10: Code-Review+1
Patch Set 10: Code-Review+2

Patch Set 10:

This patch depends on patches #14374 and #14375. It cannot be cherry-picked until they have been landed.

Patch Set 10:

If this patch is refreshed, it should be reordered to be before the "LU-5319 osp: manage number of modify RPCs in flight" patch, so that patch can be deferred until after 2.8.

Patch Set 10:

It is not possible to reorder the patch since rpc_lock serialization (struct mdc_rpc_lock, mdc_get/put_rpc_lock() routines) is currently used by osp component.

The patch "LU-5319 osp: manage number of modify RPCs in flight" updates osp component to use the obd_get/put_mod_rpc_slot() routines instead of mdc_get/put_rpc_lock().

Abandoned

The patch content has been merged with patch #14375 "LU-6864 osp: manage number of modify RPCs in flight"

parents.subject: LU-5319 osp: manage number of modify RPCs in flight

commit.subject: LU-5319 mdc: remove deprecated metadata RPC serialization
commit.message:
LU-5319 mdc: remove deprecated metadata RPC serialization

The rpc_lock serialization has been replaced to allow multiple
modify RPCs in parallel.

Signed-off-by: Gregoire Pichon <gregoire.pichon@bull.net>
Change-Id: I417a58e96523d9973a0b6b7df25b0328b23e6f5f
